codeReview.summary: Reviewed the fix feature handoff, transcript skeleton, prior failed review, scrutiny synthesis, and commits `61eef17fd722480c6d9d48a4daaae975d8204969` and `7771b5e221086fa29530a1e34c77e4eaa3acd389`. The original blocker was real: the earlier governance fix left the architecture document tracked only as lowercase `docs/architecture.md`, which could pass on macOS while still failing the canonical Linux-safe contract. This fix stays narrowly scoped and resolves that defect by renaming the tracked file to `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md` and updating the small set of affected historical-doc links in `docs/INDEX.md` and `docs/deprecated/INDEX.md` to the uppercase canonical path. `ci/lint-knowledgebase.sh` requires `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md`, `ci/check-architecture.sh` prefers that uppercase path, and `git ls-tree HEAD -- docs/` now shows only `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md`, so the prior case-sensitive CI blocker is adequately addressed.

summary: Pass. Commit `7771b5e221086fa29530a1e34c77e4eaa3acd389` adequately fixes the prior blocking failure by making `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md` a real tracked path and keeping the affected links consistent, so the docs/governance merge blockers are now Linux-safe with respect to the canonical architecture-doc path.
